data.question: Does this ECG show ST elevation in at least two of the lateral leads, including leads I, aVL, V5, and V6?

Does this ECG show pathological Q waves in at least two of the lateral leads, including leads I, aVL, V5, and V6? Note that a pathological Q wave in these leads is defined as a Q wave with a duration greater than 30 milliseconds and an amplitude greater than one fifth of the following R amplitude, or (2) a deep S wave with only a small R wave preceding it.
